title: Recovery
subtitle: Find patients who are due for recall, left treatment unfinished, missed appointments, or need payment follow-up.

empty.title: No recall candidates found
empty.description: Generate candidates or adjust filters to review recoverable patients.

errors.settingsDisabled: Recall system is disabled for this clinic.

contact.title: Log contact
contact.notePlaceholder: What happened during the call or message?

messageModal.title: WhatsApp draft
messageModal.privacyNote: This draft intentionally avoids diagnosis, treatment details, and sensitive health data.

settingsSummary.title: Smart Patient Recovery
settingsSummary.description: The smart patient recovery system tracks patients who are due for check-up or left treatment unfinished.

settings.title: Smart Patient Recovery and Recall
settings.subtitle: Create automatic follow-up rules for patients due for check-up, unfinished treatment, or missed follow-up.
settings.safeDefault: Automatic sending is not used by default. Start with list, task, or draft actions.
settings.readOnly: You can view recall settings, but only managers can edit them.
settings.systemDisabledNotice: Recall system is off. The rules below will run again when the system is enabled.
settings.paymentGentleLanguage: Use gentle language. Do not use aggressive collection wording.

fields.enabledHelp: Turns candidate generation on or off.
fields.respectConsentHelp: No WhatsApp draft if consent is missing.

checkup.title: Routine check-up recall
checkup.description: Find patients whose last completed visit or treatment is past the configured check-up interval.

treatmentPlan.title: Treatment plan follow-up
treatmentPlan.description: Find patients who received a treatment plan but have not started it.

incompleteTreatment.title: Incomplete treatment follow-up
incompleteTreatment.description: Find treatment cases with completed and pending steps.

noShow.title: No-show recovery
noShow.description: Follow up missed appointments when no new active appointment exists.

payment.title: Payment follow-up reminder
payment.description: Find overdue payment plan installments when the payment model supports it.
